case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SALVADOR PINEDA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, SALVADOR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, SALVADOR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINEDA, SALVADOR $2,423.93 PRINCIPAL, $127.88 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,800.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
